specs.title: cp-000: Preset selector Sequential Build Fade All Stagger Results Reveal None
cp-001: Apply Preset button applies selected preset to active slide
cp-002: Clear All button removes all animations from active slide
cp-003: Reveal Summary
cp-004: Animated blocks count
cp-005: Reveal steps count
cp-006: Orders list
cp-007: Note Per-block timing is edited from block properties or the timeline
cp-008: Collapsible section with Animation Timeline header
cp-009: Shows count of animated blocks
cp-010: Preview button plays animation sequence preview
cp-011: Previewing state while running button disabled
cp-012: Timeline track
cp-013: Time axis with second markers 0s 1s 2s etc
cp-014: Order column showing reveal order numbers
cp-015: Colored bars for each animated block
cp-016: Bar width duration bar position delay
cp-017: Selected blocks bar has ring highlight
cp-018: Click bar to select corresponding block
cp-019: Drag interactions
cp-020: Drag bar horizontally to change delay
cp-021: Drag bar vertically to change reveal order
cp-022: Drag left edge to resize start adjust delay duration
cp-023: Drag right edge to resize end adjust duration
cp-024: Grid rows with dashed borders for order lanes
cp-025: Color-coded bars cycle through 8 colors
cp-026: ThemeProvider wraps slides in CSS custom properties
cp-027: CSS variables exposed
cp-028: --slide-primary --slide-secondary --slide-bg --slide-text
cp-029: --slide-accent --slide-surface --slide-border
cp-030: --slide-code-bg --slide-callout-bg
cp-031: --slide-gradient-from --slide-gradient-to
cp-032: --slide-font --slide-heading-font
cp-033: isDarkTheme correctly identifies dark backgrounds
cp-034: All block renderers inherit theme variables
